summary: Subscription Plan System Testing Complete - Backend APIs and Frontend UI verified. 25/32 backend tests passed. Pricing page renders correctly with all 3 plans (FREE/PRO/PRO+), currency toggle (EUR/USD/GBP), and billing period toggle. Login and dashboard access working.

minor.issue: Returns 500 instead of 401 when called without authentication (request body validation happens before auth check)
Returns 403 instead of 401 when called without authentication

P0_current_plan_endpoint: ✓ Returns user plan with features and limits
✓ Includes feature flags (max_prospects, daily_ai_suggestions, sms_one_click, heat_score, roi_dashboard, interaction_history)
P0_check_feature_endpoint: ✓ Returns correct access status for heat_score
✓ Returns correct access status for sms_one_click
✓ Returns correct access status for roi_dashboard
P0_pricing_page_frontend: ✓ FREE plan card visible with features
✓ PRO plan card visible with 'Popular' badge
✓ PRO+ plan card visible with premium features
✓ Annual pricing shows '-2 mo.' savings badge
✓ Prices update correctly when switching currencies
P3_roi_dashboard_endpoint: ✓ Returns ROI data (locked for FREE plan as expected)
P3_weekly_report_endpoint: ✓ Returns report data (locked for FREE plan as expected)

action_items: MINOR: Fix /api/ai/generate-sms to return 401 instead of 500 when no auth provided (move auth check before request body validation)
MINOR: Fix /api/interactions/{prospect_id} to return 401 instead of 403 when no auth provided
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription plan system is fully implemented. All P0 endpoints working correctly. Pricing page renders 3 plans with currency/billing toggles. Test user has 'active' subscription status but 'free' plan. Premium features (heat_score, roi_dashboard, weekly_report) are correctly locked for FREE users. Minor auth response code issues in 2 endpoints (500/403 instead of 401).
